programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Jack runs into trouble when he dates a pretty gym instructor.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Jack faces eviction when he lets it slip to Furley that he is not gay.

programme.desc: Jack and Chrissy are handcuffed together as a joke and then discover they have no key.

programme.desc: Robert moves into his own apartment, leaving a void in the rest of the Barone household.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: A 12-year-old runaway moves into the apartment.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.sub-title: Lee Ain't Heavy, He's My Brother
programme.desc: Jack becomes enraged when his brother decides to romance Chrissy.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Chrissy's big track winnings threaten to split the threesome.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Chrissy sets up a rendezvous with the man who has been sending her secret love notes.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: The roommates help Furley attract a lady friend.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: A dishonest student may prevent Jack's graduation.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Jack charges his new boss with sexual harassment.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Jack and Larry unknowingly date the same woman.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Jack prepares three different meals in three separate apartments.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Janet discovers that Chrissy's old high-school friend is a prostitute.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: A lovely skier thinks Jack is an alpine champion.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Jack's friends think he is the chef at a fancy French restaurant where he is actually a busboy.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Chrissy's cousin Cindy (Jenilee Harrison) arrives.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Cindy's boss expects her to be his errand girl.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Jack gets a prestigious job after being mistaken for a famous chef.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: An elderly neighbor smothers Jack with attention.

programme.title: High Plains Drifter
programme.desc: In this Western, a drifter with no name wanders into a small town, where his gun-slinging abilities are in high demand. When the drifter rides into Lago, he is met with incredulity and disapproval by the townspeople. But once he shows his skills with a pistol, the locals realize he may be able to help them fend off a band of criminals who have been terrorizing the town. He agrees to help the townspeople, but does so with his own secret agenda.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales

programme.title: The Quick and the Dead
programme.desc: A mysterious woman gunslinger, Ellen (Sharon Stone), saunters into the town of Redemption looking for revenge. Her father was killed by the town's sadistic mayor, Herod (Gene Hackman), who is in the midst of organizing a quick-draw tournament. The lady enters, joining a cast of miscreants and outlaws for a brutal competition in which the loser dies. Among the competitors is "The Kid" (Leonardo DiCaprio), an upstart who has his own score to settle with Herod.

rating.system: Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales
Instituto Nacional de Cine y Artes Audiovisuales

programme.title: Point Break
programme.desc: After a string of bizarre bank robberies in Southern California, with the crooks donning masks of various former presidents, a federal agent, Johnny Utah (Keanu Reeves), infiltrates the suspected gang. But this is no ordinary group of robbers. They're surfers -- led by the charismatic Bodhi (Patrick Swayze) -- who are addicted to the rush of thievery. But when Utah falls in love with a female surfer, Tyler (Lori Petty), who is close to the gang, it complicates his sense of duty.

rating.system: Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía
Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales
Instituto Nacional de Cine y Artes Audiovisuales
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.desc: Debra learns that beautiful neighbors are the real reason Ray is spending so much time at Robert's apartment.

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Marie and Frank devastate Ray by trading in their gift, a personally engraved toaster, for a coffee maker.

programme.desc: Ray challenges his father to a game of table tennis after learning that the elder Barone purposely let him win.

programme.title: Point Break
programme.desc: After a string of bizarre bank robberies in Southern California, with the crooks donning masks of various former presidents, a federal agent, Johnny Utah (Keanu Reeves), infiltrates the suspected gang. But this is no ordinary group of robbers. They're surfers -- led by the charismatic Bodhi (Patrick Swayze) -- who are addicted to the rush of thievery. But when Utah falls in love with a female surfer, Tyler (Lori Petty), who is close to the gang, it complicates his sense of duty.

rating.system: Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía
Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales
Instituto Nacional de Cine y Artes Audiovisuales
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: High Plains Drifter
programme.desc: In this Western, a drifter with no name wanders into a small town, where his gun-slinging abilities are in high demand. When the drifter rides into Lago, he is met with incredulity and disapproval by the townspeople. But once he shows his skills with a pistol, the locals realize he may be able to help them fend off a band of criminals who have been terrorizing the town. He agrees to help the townspeople, but does so with his own secret agenda.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales

programme.title: The Quick and the Dead
programme.desc: A mysterious woman gunslinger, Ellen (Sharon Stone), saunters into the town of Redemption looking for revenge. Her father was killed by the town's sadistic mayor, Herod (Gene Hackman), who is in the midst of organizing a quick-draw tournament. The lady enters, joining a cast of miscreants and outlaws for a brutal competition in which the loser dies. Among the competitors is "The Kid" (Leonardo DiCaprio), an upstart who has his own score to settle with Herod.

rating.system: Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales
Instituto Nacional de Cine y Artes Audiovisuales

programme.title: The Money Pit
programme.desc: Young lovers Walter (Tom Hanks) and Anna (Shelley Long) are house-sitting the New York City apartment owned by Max (Alexander Godunov), Anna's ex-husband, who suddenly decides to toss them out. Needing a new home, they settle on buying a country estate outside the city, which is available for a suspiciously low price. It soon becomes apparent why, as doors fall off their hinges, staircases come tumbling down and a bathtub falls through the floor. The couple's relationship suffers similarly.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: The Jerk
programme.desc: Navin (Steve Martin) believes he was born a poor black child in Mississippi. He is, however, actually white. Upon figuring this out, he heads north to St. Louis to find himself. After landing a job at a gas station, Navin is excited to discover his name printed in the new phone book. This ratification of his existence leads him from one misadventure to another -- as he invents gadgets, dodges bullets, joins the carnival and seeks love in the arms of beautiful Marie (Bernadette Peters).

programme.title: Spaceballs
programme.desc: In a distant galaxy, planet Spaceball has depleted its air supply, leaving its citizens reliant on a product called "Perri-Air." In desperation, Spaceball's leader President Skroob (Mel Brooks) orders the evil Dark Helmet (Rick Moranis) to kidnap Princess Vespa (Daphne Zuniga) of oxygen-rich Druidia and hold her hostage in exchange for air. But help arrives for the Princess in the form of renegade space pilot Lone Starr (Bill Pullman) and his half-man, half-dog partner, Barf (John Candy).

rating.system: Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
